project_type: Android Kotlin WebView app with bundled HTML/CSS/JS clock display
test_framework: No automated tests - manual visual verification via APK
verification_instructions: Build the APK with ./gradlew assembleDebug and verify no compilation errors. Visually verify HTML templates are well-formed.
setup_instructions: JDK 17 required. Run ./gradlew assembleDebug from project root.
environment_constraints: No Android device available for runtime testing. Validate via successful build and AST/structural checks of HTML/JS.
contribution_requirements: Each fix/feature on a separate branch -> PR. All layout keys must match <template id='layout-{key}'> pattern. SUPPORTED_LAYOUTS in clock.js must include keys. arrays.xml entries/values must be synced.

key_patterns.required_ids: id='digital', id='nextPill', id='nextLabel', id='nextCountdown', id='analogWrap', data-analog, id='greg-date', id='hij-date', id='masjidPrefix', id='masjidName', id='masjidAddress', id='logoBox'
key_patterns.slideshow_host: for photo backgrounds
key_patterns.prayer_highlight: .prayer.next class added by renderTimes() in clock.js; styled via screen.css per-layout rules
key_patterns.slide_opacity_var: --slide-opacity CSS variable set on :root by clock.js from cfg.slideshow_opacity (0-1 range)

directory_structure: app/src/main/assets/web/ contains the bundled web app (index.html with <template> elements for each layout, css/screen.css for styles, js/clock.js for all logic). app/src/main/res/values/arrays.xml contains dropdown options for the settings UI.
